dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION • Instruct patients and caregivers to take the recommended dosage as directed, because medication errors have led to deaths. (2.1, 5.9) • Verify pregnancy status in females of reproductive potential before starting methotrexate tablets. (4, 5.1) • ALL: The recommended dosage is 20 mg/m 2 orally once weekly as a part of a combination chemotherapy maintenance regimen. (2.2) • Mycosis fungoides: The recommended dosage is 25 to 75 mg orally once weekly as monotherapy; 10
